cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are a bunch of partner switches, so I need to track each one step by step. Let me start by listing the initial partners. Initially: - Alice is with Sam - Bob is with Izzi - Claire is with Jamie - Dave is with Ophelia - Eve is with Patrick Now, the problem says there are several partner switches. Let me go through each one in order. First switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. So Bob, who was with Izzi, now takes Dave's partner, which is Ophelia. And Dave takes Bob's original partner, Izzi. So after this first switch: - Alice: Sam - Bob: Ophelia - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Izzi - Eve: Patrick Second switch: Alice and Eve switch
